pages.raw_text:
The proposed ordinance to ap-
point city electrical and gas in
spector was referred back to the
committee of the whole council
last night. 1t was about to be taken
up when Councilman Lambert said
that a committee wanted 1t re-
ferred back for future discussion.


The committee was from the
Spokane Falls Gas Light Co. Just
what more there Is to discuss
Lambert did not say.


The evident object Is to delay
the appointment OF an inspector as
long as possibly. Numerous COM
plants about the unjust charges of
the gas company have been made.
Even the councilmen having a kick.
Councilman Pratt recently said
that he would get gas inspector
40 cases in as many minutes that
should be inspected, and ! Of the
cases was his own.
